San Francisco Crime Timeline
Now you can choose what crimes you want to explore! Use our interactive map to see different types of crimes and their geographical and temporal distribution, filter by category and slide through the years to see the evolution of crime patterns around SF from 2007 until 2017
↑ Each dot represents a reported crime incident at its exact location, colored by crime group.
Use the slider, play button, and legend toggles. Hover over dots for specific crime type, or over the map to see police district boundaries.
